Title: ~mission(TargetName) Whereabouts Unknown
Description:
ABOUT THE JOB
microTech Protection Services is seeking a qualified contractor to assist in the search for ~mission(TargetName) who was last seen near the ~mission(Location) at ~mission(Location|Address) but who's current whereabouts are unknown. 

Our preliminary investigation has led us to suspect foul play may be behind their disappearance. As such, heightened caution is advised as there may be hostile actors involved.

RESPONSIBILITIES
• Provide own transportation to ~mission(Location|address).
• Confirm the location of ~mission(TargetName) and if they are still alive.

MINIMUM QUALIFICATIONS
• 2 years security experience.
• Available for immediate deployment.

PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS
• Experience with conducting missing person investigations.
• Ability to handle high pressure situations.
